news.title: Yemen's Houthis launch Israel strike, the first time since the U.S.-Israel war began
news.summary: The entry of the Houthis in the war marks a significant escalation in the conflict. The conflict in Yemen is now in its second month.

news.title: Analysis: A new oil shock is building. The next few weeks of war will be decisive for the economy.
news.summary: Energy markets are starting to reflect the growing risk of physical supply disruptions, says Andrew Keen. Keen: "The world needs to be prepared for the possibility of a physical supply disruption"

news.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
news.summary: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

news.title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
news.summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.

news.title: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years
news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway shares have lost ground for eight consecutive days. It is their longest losing streak since December of 2018. Berkshire Hathaway is owned by Warren Buffett and other prominent investors.

news.title: ‘He didn’t seem very alert’: Our CPA said we owe the IRS $443, but we’re actually due a refund of $637. Do we fire him?
news.summary: “We’re both concerned about the accuracy of our returns,” he says. “We are both concerned that we’ve done the right thing.”

news.title: ‘What felt like a great deal turned into a $150 night’: How am I supposed to have fun without going broke?
news.summary: “How can I strike a balance between enjoying the present and saving for the future?” she asks. “How do I balance the two?’

news.title: These 2 chip stocks could be cheaper ways to invest in a hot AI trend
news.summary: Shares of Veeco and Axcelis have lagged their larger semiconductor-equipment peers. This makes them potentially compelling opportunities for investors.

news.title: My brother says lawyers can get him a Medicaid nursing home in Florida for a ‘hefty fee,’ despite his assets. Is this a scam?
news.summary: “I do not believe there is a way to preserve assets and still qualify for Medicaid,” he says. “I don’t believe there’s a way.”

news.title: Gas prices are nearing this ‘psychological wall.’ One group of drivers might smash right through.
news.summary: “The economy feels a bit miserable right now,” one financial-wellness expert says. “I’m shifting from autopilot to a more intentional strategy.”
